title: Eko Health - AI-Powered Digital Stethoscope
problem: Cardiac auscultation skills vary among clinicians, and traditional stethoscopes lack digital capabilities for recording and analysis.
solution: AI-powered digital stethoscopes with automated heart sound analysis and FDA-cleared arrhythmia detection.
technology: Digital stethoscope hardware, machine learning for heart sound analysis, signal processing
ai_type: ML for heart murmur and arrhythmia detection
regulatory_notes: FDA 510(k) cleared for heart murmur and AFib detection
varden_fit: Moderate - Diagnostic tool that democratizes cardiac assessment. Creates referral pathways to cardiology.
notes: Strong hardware + software play. Enabling primary care to do better cardiac screening.
